reason: Supabase cloud env has active shops and active owner/manager memberships, but every automatically discoverable owner/manager shop candidate is synthetic. Real-shop mode was not run against synthetic TASK/TEST/FIXTURE/DEMO data.
requiredToUnblock: Provide TASK077_REAL_SHOP_ID and TASK077_REAL_SHOP_USER_EMAIL for a non-synthetic active shop owner/manager, or add a real non-synthetic active shop/membership to the cloud env.
